title: 项目 Semantic Brief
author: Test Worker
theme: tech-minimal
---

# 项目 Brief

::: {.objective title="目标"}
Build a reusable brief that explains **why** the work matters.

Keep `scope.md` updated as the work changes.
:::

::: {.info title="背景信息"}
Context for reviewers:

- Audience: students and project mentors
- Window: two weeks
:::

::: {.requirement title="硬性要求"}
Include one dataset constraint and one evaluation criterion.
:::

::: {.task title="实施任务"}
Plan the implementation sequence:

1. Draft the interface
2. Review the risk register
:::

::: {.deliverable title="交付物"}
Submit `brief.pdf` and a short reviewer memo.
:::

::: {.checklist title="交接检查"}
Before handoff:

- Verify that every semantic section appears
- Confirm that the PDF keeps the Chinese project title
:::

::: {.rubric title="验收标准"}
- Scope is explicit.
- Evidence is reviewable.
:::
